title: Australian Oat Bowl with Sultana Sweetness
description: A wholesome breakfast bowl filled with the warmth of Australian oats, sweetness of sultanas, and a hint of natural goodness.

ingredients.name: Bowl
ingredients.notes: Any ceramic or glass bowl suitable for hot food

instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring 2 cups of water to a boil.
Add 1 cup of Australian oats and reduce heat to a simmer.
Cook oats for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until creamy and tender.
Add 1/2 cup of sultanas and 2 tablespoons of sweetener to the oats. Stir to combine.
Remove saucepan from heat and let it sit for 1-2 minutes.
Add 1 cup of milk or non-dairy alternative and stir gently to create a smooth consistency.
Transfer the oat mixture to a bowl.
Serve warm, garnished with additional sultanas if desired.
